why_load_bearing: 'Einsamkeit' is kept as chosen solitude rather than accidental loneliness, and 'verwandelte sich sein Herz' remains an inner transformation rather than a mere change of mood.
preferred_handling: keep chosen solitude and inner heart-transformation visible together

why_load_bearing: 'Abglanz' remains afterglow, reflection, or reflected radiance; witness layers should keep the difference between source light and carried shine. 'Wonne' and 'ликование' keep the image affectively high without collapsing into mere pleasure.
preferred_handling: keep reflected light distinct from source light and bliss distinct from flat pleasure

why_load_bearing: 'wieder Mensch werden' is held as a return into the human after ripening, not as simple regression to a prior self; here return stays an action, while eternal return remains only a hidden rhythm of the route.
preferred_handling: preserve return to the human as a deliberate action after ripening

why_load_bearing: 'Gestirn' is kept broad enough to preserve star and luminary valence; the witness layers should not reduce the image to a merely astronomical label.
preferred_handling: keep star and luminary valence open rather than narrowing to astronomy only

why_load_bearing: 'Überfluss' is treated as overflow available for reciprocal reception; the movement remains mutual blessing rather than one-sided illumination.
preferred_handling: preserve reciprocal overflow rather than one-sided illumination

why_load_bearing: 'Thorheit' remains philosophically charged as folly with an edge toward madness; the route should not flatten it into mere stupidity or comic error.
preferred_handling: keep folly philosophically charged beyond simple stupidity

why_load_bearing: 'Unterwelt' remains the underworld of downward address and light-bearing descent rather than an abstract elsewhere or neutral distance.
preferred_handling: preserve the downward underworld destination of the light-bearing movement

why_load_bearing: 'untergehen' is preserved as down-going or going-under; Russian 'закатиться' keeps the solar and recurrent motion without reducing the act to defeat alone.
preferred_handling: keep solar down-going visible rather than reducing the term to defeat
